name: The Way Down: God, Greed, and the Cult of Gwen Shamblin
original_name: The Way Down: God, Greed, and the Cult of Gwen Shamblin
overview: Explore how the late Gwen Shamblin Lara, who founded the controversial Remnant Fellowship Church and created the Christian weight loss program The Weigh Down Workshop, rose to fame as a diet guru and church leader.

trailers.title: The Way Down: God, Greed and the Cult of Gwen Shamblin Documentary Series Trailer | RTTV
